tips: Never commit API keys or secrets to version control
Store secrets in environment variables or a vault, never in source code
Use .env files with --env-file in Bun for local secret management
Always validate and sanitize user inputs to prevent injection attacks
Use HTTPS for all API calls in production environments
Implement rate limiting to protect against abuse and DoS attacks
Use the principle of least privilege for API keys and tokens
Regularly rotate API keys and credentials
Audit your dependencies with 'bun pm audit' for known vulnerabilities
Use Content Security Policy headers when serving web content
Never log sensitive data like passwords, tokens, or PII
Use Subresource Integrity (SRI) for loaded external scripts and styles
